channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月16日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 A 0-click exploit chain for the Pixel 10 #2 ASCII by Jason Scott #3 O(x)Caml in Space #4 Explore Wikipedia Like a Windows XP Desktop #5 High dimensional geometry is transforming the MRI industry(2017) [pdf] #6 I built Zenith: a live local-first fixed viewport planetarium #7 Trade Dollars with other startups. Book it as revenue #8 We are retiring our bug bounty program #9 A new book on Steve Jobs at NeXT #10 Radicle: Sovereign {code forge} built on Git
